recap: Added kitty-overlay-window-id (resolves overlay parent via kitty-remote ls + jq) and kitty-window-send-text (forwards text to a window via kitty-remote send-text --match id:<id>).
Added kitty-ctrl-p script (calls kitty-overlay-window-id, runs ctrl-p, shell-quotes selections via ${(q-)}, sends to parent via kitty-window-send-text) and wired alt+p in keybindings.conf.
